---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Grok Mode
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Milestone Relevance

Which roadmap milestone does this relate to?

- [ ] Milestone 1 — Voice Input + Copilot Chat
- [ ] Milestone 2 — TTS Output
- [ ] Milestone 3 — Action Narration
- [ ] Milestone 4 — Conversational Planning Mode
- [ ] Milestone 5 — Hands-Free Loop
- [ ] Milestone 6 — Public Release
- [ ] New milestone / stretch goal

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
